title: Restriction Digest of DNA
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"k21d","text":"Protocol adatped to match the one followed by Northeastern_Boston","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Select restriction enzymes to digest your plasmid.
Determine an appropriate reaction buffer by reading the instructions for your enzyme.

In a 1.5mL tube combine the following: DNA (all amounts are for a typical reaction; your amount may vary depending on the enzymes). Typical mixture for single digest: %s %s Component Volume Nuclease-free Water 16 ul 10X Buffer EcoRI 2 ul DNA (0.5/1 ug/ul) 1 ul EcoRI 0.5-2 ul Typical Mixture for Double Digest: %s %s Component Volume Nuclease-free Water 15 ul 10X Buffer 0 2 ul DNA (0.5-1 ug/ul) 1 ul EcoRI 1 ul PstI 1 ul undetermined
Incubate tube at appropriate temperature (usually 37°C) for 1 hour. 01:00:00
